sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114584" key="xreok" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρεοκ-</orth>, <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρεολ-</orth>, etc., later forms in compos. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρεω-,</foreign> acc. to Lob.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Phryn.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">390</biblScope> </bibl>; but Hdn.Epim.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">207</biblScope> </bibl> prefers the short vowel.</entryFree>
